snippet.title: The Odyssey | Official New Trailer
snippet.description:
The Odyssey - In Theaters 7 17 26

Christopher Nolan’s next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX® film technology. The film brings Homer’s foundational saga to IMAX® film screens for the first time and opens in theaters everywhere on July 17, 2026. 

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong’o, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.

snippet.title: Kane Keid - POV (#RespectTheArtform)
snippet.description:
Prod by BZM

I tried to warn them 
He knows we don’t feel him, them clips ain’t real and we can’t be bros, don’t wanna 
And you know we ain’t drillers, but we deep in streets, we ain’t talking about chilling on corners 
Coroners keeping the order, small fries scorched, door by door, keeping serving 
4 x 4 big swerving 
Ignored my former trauma, I’ll heal in a Porsche 
Calculated moves like Physics 
Flow still going, no limits
The motion giving them them sickness 
Still float your boat, don’t trick us
The fight is real, so Dricuss
We ain’t had this much in the village  
And this gift wasn’t wrapped in ribbons
When the shots directed, we been still as (Ben Stillers) the images building 
Horror on mic, it sound like it’s thriller 
Moves got me popping over time, but give a minute 
I promise I’ll show you why niggas come second
“The Naked Truth” told me I shouldn’t address it 
But it later registered, I can’t accept it 
Aye plus, I’m the only drop out outclassing all his peers, I told you don’t test us 


I tried to see that shit from their POV, I can’t see 
I’d rather go mute, deaf and blind before I lose my reasoning 
Them niggas only tryna be like me, ain’t no LOVE
And I’ll risk it lose again? I’ll still bet on me
Fuck, I’d risk and lose again? I’d still bet on me
How many bands? 2 or 10? I’d still bet on me
Lose a band, lose a friend? I still bet on me
Fuck, I’ll risk and lose again, I’d still bet on me


Not even my girl begging for my attention like this bitch
Can’t do it on your own, need assistance 
Trolling tactics, and the podcast gimmicks? 
Internet pitbull, in person you bitching 
You don’t feel me, why you keep me in your mentions?
Is you dissing or admitting I’m the standard to niggas 
If you can’t rap with me, don’t change the premise
I’ll be back in a sec…. fuck it
Well I got time today, 
I got a lot to say
Thought about keeping it brief, that is not the case 
I’ll cut them dreadlocks off, we can run the fade 
Yall niggas raps all pause, I can’t even play 
Circulate pictures of nigga face on woman’s body, what a weird phase 
But I hope you outgrow all childish tendencies, weird fantasies but either way 
You ain’t never had belt to booty
Now I’ll handle your daddy’s duties
Let me prove it 
We can start off ngok’shisa imphepho, instead of handing you plenty doobies 
Now you disillusioned
Knock that styrofoam cup out your hand
Ngik’nike intelezi ngoba uthanda muthi 
Put you on Fela Kuti, and your vocab need improvement 
Don’t act you like you ever knew me, lil bitch
